comment.body: In normal times, it would just be a regional clash and have little impact. Yet, it’s a sign that many dormant conflicts might be awoken in today’s situation, as Alma wrote. It looks almost like a proxy war, where China backs Pakistan in attempt to prevent India from siding with the West… Some news also came out that China was sharing intelligence with the Houthis, blocking the Red Sea shipping route…
